input_text: I want an AI system that predicts warehouse stockouts using camera feeds from shelves and ERP inventory signals. The model should alert managers when a shelf is empty before the ERP catches up.

decomposed_features.name: Pre-ERP alerting based on temporal lag between shelf state and ERP updates

top_prior_art.title: Inventory prediction using ERP and sensors

redesign_suggestions: Focus on camera + ERP temporal lag prediction.
Explore multi-modal fusion with audio or weight sensors.
